violations.text: Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, rice was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. PIC discarded rice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
